items.title: US strikes Iran targets for second time in three days
items.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

items.title: Jill Biden says she thought husband was having a stroke during 2024 debate
items.summary: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.

items.title: Israel issues evacuation order for swathes of southern Lebanon
items.summary: The military says areas south of the Zahrani River are now "combat zones" as it threatens Hezbollah with fresh strikes.

items.title: Amerika opet napala Iran, Iran uzvratio napadom na američku bazu
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska izvela je nove napade na Iran, koji je uzvratio gađajući američku bazu.

items.title: Bidenova supruga: Mislila sam da će Joe dobiti moždani udar tijekom debate s Trumpom
items.summary: BIVŠA prva dama Jill Biden otkrila je da je tijekom debate 2024. mislila da Joe Biden doživljava moždani udar. Njegov loš nastup na kraju je doveo do povlačenja iz predsjedničke utrke.

items.title: Oil prices jump after US launches new attacks on Iran
items.summary: The strikes come despite a ceasefire between Tehran and Washington as the two countries hold peace talks.

items.title: Iran uzvratio udarac SAD-u, napali američku bazu
items.summary: IRANSKE snage gađale su američku zračnu bazu kao odgovor na napad SAD-a. Eskalacija dovodi u pitanje primirje, unatoč oprečnim informacijama o mogućem dogovoru između dviju strana.

items.title: I dalje traje potraga za nestalima nakon eksplozije u američkoj tvornici papira
items.summary: NAKON eksplozije u tvornici papira u Washingtonu traži se 9 nestalih uz potvrđene smrti i ozlijeđene, a rijeka Columbia je kontaminirana.

items.title: Amerika opet napala Iran
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska ponovno je napala Iran ciljajući mjesta za koje američki dužnosnici vjeruju da predstavljaju prijetnju američkim snagama i komercijalnom pomorskom prometu u Hormuškom tjesnacu.

items.title: Australia charges woman who returned from Syria with joining Islamic State
items.summary: Several groups of women and children who spent years in a Syrian camp have returned in recent months.

items.title: Australia sues US giant 3M over 'forever chemicals' in firefighting foam
items.summary: The A$2bn case, which centres on contamination at defence sites, is the largest ever brought by the government.

items.title: Google employee charged with insider trading over Polymarket bets
items.summary: Michele Spagnuolo allegedly used insider information to profit from bets on people on Google's most-searched list.

items.title: Aid cuts and climate change drive deadly malaria surge in Zimbabwe
items.summary: A surge in malaria cases in Zimbabwe is exposing fragile health systems and growing treatment shortages in rural areas.

items.title: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
items.summary: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.

items.title: Parisians defy swimming ban to cool off as record heat hits Europe
items.summary: Parisians cooled off in the city’s Saint-Martin canal as an unprecedented heatwave pushed temperatures across Europe.

items.title: Uganda closes border with DRC in an effort to contain Ebola outbreak
items.summary: Uganda has closed its border with neighbouring DR Congo for four weeks in an effort to contain an Ebola outbreak.

items.title: US returns Palestinian rights expert Francesca Albanese to sanctions list
items.summary: Trump administration has sought to pressure international officials who scrutinise reported abuses by Israeli forces.

items.title: Iran war live: US strikes Iranian site; Kuwait targeted by missiles, drones
items.summary: Kuwait's military says air defences are battling 'hostile' missiles and drones, as alarms sound across the country.

items.title: Jill Biden worried husband Joe was ‘having a stroke’ during 2024 US debate
items.summary: The former US first lady said she had never seen former President Joe Biden act the way he did on the 2024 debate stage.

items.title: Bolivia’s president warns ‘time is running out’ amid protest crisis
items.summary: Bolivia’s president has warned protesters “time is running out” amid a weeks-long standoff.
